etymology.description: 亼 (assembly) + 兄 (elder brother) repeated -> people responding to a call together; then stylized as 亼 + 吅 (echoing) + 从 (following)
etymology.interpretation: The character 僉 originally depicted people collectively agreeing or responding together, symbolized by 亼 (assembly) and the repeated 兄 (elder brother) to signify unanimity. Over time, it incorporated 吅 (echoing) and 从 (following) to emphasize the aspect of unanimous agreement or collective response.
